headline: Saturday starts now: control the snacking, protect the goal
summary: Today you must cut emotional snacking by 50% and move deliberately for 45 minutes to close your 0.24kg weekly deficit.
details: Replace your Saturday snacking urge with Huel meals and zero discretionary food outside your plan—emotional eating costs you 0.24kg/week that you desperately need to cut. Get 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today, non-negotiable intensity. This Saturday matters because you gained 0.1kg last week when you should have lost 0.58kg; today's discipline starts the momentum shift toward your June 2027 target.
